Reviews Contact

About Legacy Plumbing

12+ years serving Atlanta and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Legacy Plumbing began as a small family operation serving historic neighborhoods like Virginia-Highland and Inman Park. We've grown by treating every home like it's our own.

Our approach combines old-school craftsmanship with modern solutions tailored to Atlanta's unique plumbing challenges. We know red clay soil shifts pipes and summer humidity accelerates corrosion.

When we're not under your sink, we're volunteering with Atlanta Habitat for Humanity or sponsoring Little League teams across Cobb County. This city's our home too.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Legacy Plumbing

Trusted plumbing professionals serving Atlanta, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
